feedback.text: This initiative seems pretty good, having good points to discuss.. Id like to add my own wishes to be added. My wishes for the Digital Fairness Act to include the protection and ownership of digital goods, games, e-books, music or things you have bought or otherwise purchased. software included. Hoping to stop removal and even blocking of use of ones own products from their own online libraries of games and e-books from websites or online platforms. To bring up to publishers or other entities that games should be preserved and that is what Stop destroying Video Games initiative is trying to solve.. I want to see and still use what Ive already bought digitally, even after many years has passed. I also hope something good comes out of this. Many regards from a citizen of the EU.
